experiment_focus: Gordon control: FC1 T1 Marksman into ordinary T1 Infantry with Gordon
setup: 1 ordinary Lv.1.0 Infantry attacker Colonel Mueller with Gordon vs 1 FC1 Lv.1.0 Marksman defender Alpaca/Far Seer, no Marksman hero.

assumptions: Skill 2 trigger count n implies final turn in [3n, 3n+2].
Skill 3 trigger count m implies final turn in [4m, 4m+3].
The overlap is recorded as the inferred turn window; no exact single turn is forced.

attacker.name: Colonel Mueller
attacker.troop_stat_reference: wos_sim/troop_catalog.py::_TIER_ROWS :: ordinary Infantry T1, no Fire Crystal

composition.troop_stat_reference: wos_sim/troop_catalog.py::_TIER_ROWS :: ordinary Infantry T1, no Fire Crystal

stats_capture.source: visible PDF stat panel for E-NIF1b R02
stats_capture.notes: R02 is the plain Colonel Mueller, no visible [RFJ] alliance tag, and has the lower Gordon stat block visible in the R02 source panel.
manual_fill: Marksman Health was cut off in the source panel and filled from Martin instruction on 2026-07-17.

hero_skills.name: Gordon Skill 2
hero_skills.effect: Enemy Damage Dealt reduction for 1 turn every 3 turns per local Gordon reference.

hero_skills.name: Gordon Skill 3
hero_skills.effect: Visible trigger-counter row; modeled with 4-turn cadence per local Gordon reference.

stats_capture.source: visible PDF stat panel for this ENIF batch
stats_capture.notes: Marksman Health is recorded as null where the Battle Details overlay cropped or covered the final stat row.
manual_fill: Marksman Health was cut off in the source panel and filled from Martin instruction on 2026-07-17.

notes: E-NIF1b Gordon-control sample: Gordon replaces Gatot on the Mueller T1 Infantry side.
Alpaca/Far Seer fields FC1 T1 Marksman; this is not ordinary non-FC T1 Marksman.
Gordon skill levels recorded per Martin instruction as [2, 2, 3].
Gordon Skill 2 and Skill 3 visible trigger counts are used to infer a turn window instead of a single exact turn.
Marksman Health stat row is not visible in the PDF crop and is recorded as null rather than guessed.

Correction 2026-07-17: R02 source panel shows plain Colonel Mueller with no [RFJ] alliance tag and the lower Gordon/Mueller stat block: Infantry 179.1/179.7/112.0/108.7, Lancer 415.7/405.9/110.6/106.9, Marksman 179.1/174.2/121.2/null.
Correction 2026-07-17: Marksman Health values manually filled per Martin instruction: Alpaca/Far Seer 129.0%; Colonel Mueller 118.6% except E-NIF1b R01 Colonel Mueller 128.6%.

_extraction.extracted_by: Codex local OCR/visual transcription from rendered PDF battle-report panels
_extraction.ocr_confidence: manual_visual_high_for_visible battle overview, unit card, and skill rows; medium for cropped final stat rows
manual_overrides: Martin specified Gordon skill levels are 2, 2, and 3 respectively.
Martin specified the ENIF categories and emphasized troop class/tier distinctions.
FC1 base troop stats were taken from docs/TroopStats/WOS_Troop_Stats_FC1-FC10_T1-T10.json.
Correction pass: R02 was rechecked against report_02_p1_s2.png and differs from R01/R03/R04 in Mueller alliance and stats.
Martin supplied cut-off Marksman Health values: Alpaca/Far Seer 129.0%; Colonel Mueller 118.6%, except E-NIF1b R01 Colonel Mueller 128.6%.
